column3: Make sure you logged in to the application
Click the dropdown which shows `English`, `FranĂ§ais`. the dropdown box is located on the right side above the `Application Progress` menu
Select `FranĂ§ais` if you are in English language or `English` if you are in French language.

column4: The text on the application form changes as per the selection. If you select `FranĂ§ais`, the text should change to French language
